chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-663 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For orders on M.A.No.3117/2021 (E/A). 03. For hearing of main case. 19.01.2022 Mr. Habibullah Ghouri, Advocate for the petitioners. = * = * = * = * = * = The petitioners apparently are having separate cause of action; therefore, it would be in fitness of circumstances for them to file separate petitions for redressal of their grievance, if any, in accordance with law. The instant constitutional petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE.
